arts.ttl: Liverpool team vs Chelsea: Diaz and Mac Allister miss out
arts.sum: Arne Slot has named his Liverpool team to face Chelsea in the Premier League on Sunday afternoon. Liverpool’s South American contingent all drop to the bench for the clash at Anfield, following long periods of travel during the international break. arts.ttl: Reece James back as Chelsea name team to face Liverpool
arts.sum: Chelsea have named their team to face Liverpool in the Premier League on Sunday with Reece James making his first appearance of the campaign at Anfield. The Chelsea captain returns to the side at right-back, having missed the opening weeks of the season with a hamstring injury. arts.ttl: Liverpool vs. Chelsea team news: Reece James handed surprise Blues start at Anfield
arts.sum: Chelsea head coach Enzo Maresca makes two surprise inclusions in his starting lineup for Sunday's Premier League fixture at Liverpool.

arts.ttl: Man City, Liverpool to launch transfer battle for Argentina international?
arts.sum: Manchester City and Liverpool could reportedly go head-to-head to sign Brighton & Hove Albion loanee Facundo Buonanotte in 2025.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid make Trent Alexander-Arnold transfer 'decision' amid Arne Slot Liverpool update
arts.sum: The future of Trent Alexander-Arnold at Liverpool continues to be a daily topic as his contract is coming to an end next summer

arts.ttl: Liverpool transfer news: suffer ANOTHER Alexander-Arnold contract headache
arts.sum: Liverpool face another headache in their quest to keep Trent Alexander-Arnold as Barcelona and Bayern Munich have joined Real Madrid in the race to sign the player who's out of contract in the summer. Reports in Spain have suggested that Real Madrid have all but clinched the deal and he will be another world-class free agent to come in, following on from Kylian Mbappe last season.

arts.ttl: Slot compares Liverpool midfielder to Declan Rice
arts.sum: Liverpool manager Arne Slot has said he has been surprised by how ‘comfortable’ Ryan Gravenberch has been since being moved into a defensive midfield role. Gravenberch has been one of the surprise packages of the campaign after shining for Liverpool at the base of Slot’s midfield. arts.ttl: Liverpool line up Barcelona defender as Trent replacement
arts.sum: Liverpool are ready to submit a summer bid of €50m (£41.7m) to sign Barcelona’s Jules Kounde. Arne Slot’s side are scouring Europe for potential replacements for Trent Alexander-Arnold, who is out of contract at the end of the season and attracting interest from Real Madrid.
